title: Partners | Join the Able Care Ecosystem
description: Partner with Able Care to bring objective functional assessment to your clients, patients, or members.

blocks.headline: Better outcomes, together.
blocks.subtitle: We partner with EHR vendors, home health networks, therapy practices, and research institutions to embed objective functional assessment where it matters most.

blocks.headline: Integration partners
blocks.description: Able Assess connects to your existing tech stack through HL7 and FHIR-compliant APIs. We integrate with major EHR platforms including PointClickCare, MatrixCare, and Epic, ensuring assessment data flows seamlessly into your clinical workflows.

bulletPoints.text: Webhook and batch data export options

blocks.headline: Channel partners
blocks.description: Distribute Able Assess alongside your existing products and services. Our channel partner programme includes training, co-marketing support, and competitive margins.

blocks.heading: Let's explore a partnership.
blocks.bodyText: Tell us about your organisation and how Able Assess could fit. We'll arrange a call within 48 hours.
